# Houston Bankruptcy - Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
> Free Houston bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, local exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

## About
houstonbankruptcy.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.
